title: Overall protocol for top-down LC-MS/MS of human heart tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8trjo","text":"Overview description of the process for acquiring top-down LC-MS/MS data on human heart tissue","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Heart tissue was provided by University of Washington. Tissue was collected and prepared according to the following: Protocol for Tissue Collection from Organ Procurement Organization by Shin Lin
Perform LC based Proteomics on adjacent tissue sections: Tissue Homogenization and GELFrEE for Top-Down Proteomics by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
Untargeted Top-down Proteomics by LC-MS/MS on Lumos by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
Top-down proteomics data analysis on the NRTDP TDPortal by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
creator: Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
